title: Reworked Metals
description: A rework of Minecraft's metalworking system
body:
![Reworked Metals](https://imgur.com/KkE78Ik.png "Reworked Metals")

#### **Reworked Metals changes the way furnaces work and how metals are smelted to give the player a better feeling of progression and accomplishment for unlocking new things**

## **Overview**

Reworked Metals add new furnace types, new ores, new tools and armor sets and a new smelting system.  
Click on one of the images to be redirected to the corresponding [wiki](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki) page.

[![New Furnaces](https://imgur.com/esvByg0.png)](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/Furnace-Tiers)

[![New ores](https://imgur.com/2EHdliZ.png)](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/New-ores)

[![New tools](https://imgur.com/w3pP7q7.png)](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/New-tools)

[![New armor](https://imgur.com/XWevXYh.png)](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/New-armor)

[![New smelting system](https://imgur.com/pBPjYft.png)](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/New-smelting-system)

[![Smithing upgrades](https://imgur.com/RoERpZ9.png)](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/Smithing-upgrades)

## **For Modpacks**

You may use this mod in any modpack as long as you do not sell it via any means and you give credit to the original author.

**Note:** To integrate ReworkedMetals with other mods you may need to add new recipes with a datapack. Here is an explanation on how to do it: [wiki](https://github.com/HexagonNico/ReworkedMetals/wiki/Data-packs)
